name: @marcbachmann/ffprobe
description: Node.js native bindings for ffprobe non-blocking file and stream probing
author: Marc Bachmann

scripts.build: FFMPEG_DIR=/tmp/ffmpeg-build/output PKG_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/ffmpeg-build/output/lib/pkgconfig CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER=gcc CARGO_TARGET_X86_64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER=gcc RUSTC_WRAPPER=scripts/rustc-musl-wrapper.sh napi build --platform --release --features static --js binding.js --dts binding.d.ts
scripts.build:debug: FFMPEG_DIR=/tmp/ffmpeg-build/output PKG_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/ffmpeg-build/output/lib/pkgconfig CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER=gcc CARGO_TARGET_X86_64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_MUSL_LINKER=gcc RUSTC_WRAPPER=scripts/rustc-musl-wrapper.sh napi build --platform --features static --js binding.js --dts binding.d.ts
